labels.analysis: The MCP Server "AgentHC Market Intelligence" provides 4 tools focused on data analysis & processing tasks. Core capabilities include various operations. Key tools: get_market_snapshot, get_crypto_data, get_news_sentiment, get_economic_calendar.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Data Analysis & Processing" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: data.
labels.tool_verified_reason: gateway timeout: Target server timed out

tools.name: get_market_snapshot
tools.description: Real-time market snapshot: indices, volatility, yields, commodities, crypto, sentiment, and market regime.

include_prompt.description: Include formatted text for LLM prompt injection

format.description: Response format. 'agent' returns actionable signals, urgency, delta tracking, and suggested follow-ups.
